verdict: NOT-A-CLEAN-WIN — context-slope win is decisive (D1,D2,D4 hold) and Plateau BEAT control on completion, but neither arm cleared the pre-registered 90% parity floor: an INSTRUMENT CONFOUND (unreliable subagent arithmetic + GOLD-vs-error-propagation scoring) swamped the completion axis. NOT 'Plateau forgets' (Plateau > control). Re-run with a recall-only task to isolate the mechanism. Reported honestly as not-a-win per the locked rule.
library_decide_verdict: WIN — Plateau holds a near-flat context slope at completion parity while full-history climbs. Bounded context, no amnesia.

control.note: at this slope, ~11367.2 steps until budget

plateau.note: at this slope, ~5685139.7 steps until budget

ceiling_extrapolation.note: extrapolation from measured slope; not run to the literal ceiling

token_metric: estimated tokens (chars/4), identical proxy both arms
